entry.title: Sample Blog Post with LaTeX and Plots

link.title: Sample Blog Post with LaTeX and Plots

entry.content:
HELLO FROM INCLUDE

This is a sample post converted from a Jupyter notebook.

The formula $x^2 + y^2 = z^2$ is Pythagoras’ theorem.

Block math example:

\[\int_0^\infty e^{-x} dx = 1\]

Here’s a sample plot:
entry.summary: HELLO FROM INCLUDE This is a sample post converted from a Jupyter notebook. The formula $x^2 + y^2 = z^2$ is Pythagoras’ theorem. Block math example: \[\int_0^\infty e^{-x} dx = 1\] Here’s a sample plot:
